'''rashuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enantiopurity|enantiopurity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-sh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enantiopurity|enantiopurity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rashuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræshihith|ræshihith]] || [[word:ræshihij|ræshihij]] || [[word:ræshihish|ræshihish]] || [[word:ræshihi|ræshihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rashushuhuth|rashushuhuth]] || [[word:rashushuhuj|rashushuhuj]] || [[word:rashushuhush|rashushuhush]] || [[word:rashushuhu|rashushuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rashuhuth|rashuhuth]] || [[word:rashuhuj|rashuhuj]] || [[word:rashuhush|rashuhush]] || [[word:rashuhu|rashuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rashufhuth|rashufhuth]] || [[word:rashufhuj|rashufhuj]] || [[word:rashufhush|rashufhush]] || [[word:rashufhuf|rashufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rashuhuthu|rashuhuthu]] || [[word:rashuhuju|rashuhuju]] || [[word:rashuhushu|rashuhushu]] || [[word:rashuhuku|rashuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rashuhuth|rashuhuth]] || [[word:rashuhuj|rashuhuj]] || [[word:rashuhush|rashuhush]] || [[word:rashuhu|rashuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rashuhuthul|rashuhuthul]] || [[word:rashuhujul|rashuhujul]] || [[word:rashuhushul|rashuhushul]] || [[word:rashuhukul|rashuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rashuhuthuthu|rashuhuthuthu]] || [[word:rashuhujuju|rashuhujuju]] || [[word:rashuhushushu|rashuhushushu]] || [[word:rashuhuku|rashuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rashuhuthun|rashuhuthun]] || [[word:rashuhujun|rashuhujun]] || [[word:rashuhushun|rashuhushun]] || [[word:rashuhukun|rashuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rashuhuthuoro|rashuhuthuoro]] || [[word:rashuhujuoro|rashuhujuoro]] || [[word:rashuhushuoro|rashuhushuoro]] || [[word:rashuhukuoro|rashuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
